# New Epics To Implement

These are new epics to implement. Use the existing PRDs and Architecture documentation. Start the new epics at epic 30.

## Long-running stories and Rate Limiting

We've attempted to implement anti-rate-limiting measures in our prompting code and things are better. But we still get caught by AI rate limiting when we are working on long running stories in our code-story.prompt.md. in the Implementation step as there isn't a good place to stick explicit wait information that I can see.

We already have this statement throughout our code:

```
To avoid GitHub Copilot rate limiting:
- Always wait for at least 2 minutes between terminal calls, calls to MCP servers, or code updates.
- Prefer slow completion over fast failure.
```

Maybe we should change it to something more explicit, such as:

```
To avoid GitHub Copilot rate limiting:
- Always wait for at least 2 minutes between terminal calls,calls to MCP servers, or code updates.
- Prefer slow completion over fast failure.
```

I'm open to a better suggestion as long as it works.

Make sure all current statements are changed to the new statement.

## Scrolling is still janky on the tables.

You can check the video at ./ScreenerScreenScrolling.mp4 to see the janky scrolling on the Universe screen. The same issue is present on the universe screen and the account screens. Notice how the header is jumping along with the rows. This happens when we scroll down little by little and I think, is connected with having a lot of rows that virtually scroll.

This has been a problem since we first implemented the virtual scrolling, Angular Material tables. So day one of this app. This will require some investigation on your part ot figure out what is causing the problem.

Make sure you use the Playwright MCP server to verify your fix. In fact, you should probably use the Playwright MCP server to reproduce the issue first and the attempt to fix it and verify the fix with the MCP server after you've fixed the issue.

## Copy Paste Detection

Somewhere along the line, the threshold for copy paste detection was changed to 0.1.  It should be 0. This is a simple change, but it will require you to fix the copy/paste issues that surface after we lower the threshold.

## Storybook BaseTable

In epic 28, you attempted to create a storybook story for the BaseTable component that demonstrates how to use it. It look like you need to provide a DIV that has a fixed height and width around it so that it will display.
